description: Composition Grey hooded sweatshirt made of 84% cotton and 16% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hood with drawstring, ribbed hem with brand badge, full front zipper and an embroidered logo Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Every style maven's wardrobe must have an off-duty essential like this Levi's sweatshirt that flaunts the Levi's Original Riveted logo. Pair this sweatshirt with distressed jeans and sneakers to complete your functional-yet-fashionable look this winter. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
